hero.title: Security that never sleeps.
hero.lead: Premium solar-powered cameras that work where others can't — no electricity, no router required. Watch your home, farm or business from anywhere, day or night.

why.heading: Built for the way we actually live.
why.intro: Power cuts, remote plots, no fibre line — ordinary cameras fail here. Ours were chosen precisely because they don't.

cards.title: Runs on the sun
cards.text: Built-in solar panel and 8000mAh battery. No cables to the grid, no monthly electricity worry — it keeps watching through every load-shedding.

cards.title: SIM or WiFi — your choice
cards.text: Pop in a 4G SIM card and it works in the deepest rural areas with no router at all. Or connect to WiFi at home. You're covered either way.

cards.title: You see everything
cards.text: Full-colour HD by day, infrared by night, motion tracking that follows movement, and instant alerts straight to your phone — from anywhere in the world.

products.heading: Our solar camera range.
products.intro: Every model is solar-powered, weatherproof, and ready to protect indoors or out. Prices in Loti (M). Tap “Order” to reach us instantly.

items.name: VTS02-G
items.variant: Our top model — dual lens with 3 images, 2.8mm + 4mm, for the widest, sharpest coverage.
items.features: Dual lens, 3 images, 4.0MP HD, 4G SIM card, PTZ rotate & track, Two-way audio, Night vision, Voice alarm, 8W solar + 8000mAh, Indoor & outdoor

items.name: VCS20-G
items.features: Dual lens, 4.0MP HD, 4G SIM card, PTZ rotate & track, Two-way intercom, Night vision, TF card storage, 8W solar + 8000mAh

items.name: VC20-W
items.features: 3.0MP HD, WiFi connection, Two-way voice, Motion detection, Picture push, TF card storage, 8W solar + 8000mAh

items.name: VC3-W / VC3-G
items.variant: Same camera, your choice of connection: VC3-W uses WiFi, VC3-G uses a 4G SIM card. Both solar.
items.features: 5.0MP HD, PTZ rotate & track, WiFi or 4G SIM, Cloud + TF storage, Night vision, 8W solar + 8000mAh

heritage.text: Like the Maluti standing watch over the Kingdom in the Sky, HopeVision keeps a steady eye on what matters most to you — your home, your family, your livelihood. Proudly rooted in Lesotho.

people.name: Tsepo Mantutle
people.bio: Founder of HopeVision, on a mission to make reliable security accessible.

people.name: Relebohile Mafate
people.bio: Director overseeing operations, installations and client care.

people.name: Moipone Mantutle
people.bio: O thusa bareki ho fumana lik'hamera tse loketseng ts'ireletso ea bona, a araba lipotso le ho hlophisa ho rekoa. O tla u amohela ka mofuthu 'me a u tataise ho tloha qalong ho fihlela camera ea hao e kentsoe.

social.footerTagline: “Sekhele sa ts'ereletso” — your shield of security. Solar surveillance for homes, farms and businesses across Lesotho. Bua lerona...
